<var>
$DPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count) / (Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$CDPS$ = Chill Damage / Tick
$TDPS$ = $DPS$ + $CDPS$
$TED$ = Chill Damage * (Slowdown Time / Tick)
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 450; 300; 450; 1700; 4500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 425; 225; 650; 2000; 4500
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; 0;
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Expedition Gear; Bundled Up!; Arctic Soldier; Ull's Arrow
$FNC-PVP-UPGRADE$ = Expedition Gear; Bundled Up!; Arctic Soldier; Frost Bite!
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 15686418975; 15686418835; 15686418748; 15686418571
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>Calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)) at Level 3+.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Chill Damage !! Firerate !! Tick !! Max Slowdown !! Slowdown Per Hit !! Slowdown Time !! Defense Melting !! Burst Count !! Cooldown !! Range !! Freeze Time !! Total Elapsed Damage !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || N/A || 0.55 || 1 || 15% || 7.5% || 2 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 12 || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || N/A || 0.35 || 1 || 20% || 10% || 2 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 12 || N/A || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || N/A || 0.35 || 1 || 20% || 10% || 2 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 14 || 0.5 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 3 || 0.15 || 1 || 25% || 12.5% || 3 || 10% || 6 || 0.6 || 14 || 0.5 || $TED$ || $TDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $CDPS$ Chill DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 8 || 5 || 0.15 || 1 || 25% || 12.5% || 3 || 10% || 8 || 0.6 || 16 || 0.75 || $TED$ || $TDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $CDPS$ Chill DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Tick !! Max Slowdown !! Slowdown Per Hit !! Slowdown Time !! Defense Melting !! Burst Count !! Cooldown !! Range !! Freeze Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 1 || 0.5 || 0.25 || 30% || 10% || 5 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 12 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.5 || 0.25 || 40% || 10% || 5 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 12 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.5 || 0.25 || 40% || 20% || 5 || N/A || 1 || 0 || 14 || 2 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.15 || 0.25 || 60% || 20% || 5 || 10% || 4 || 0.8 || 14 || 2.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.15 || 0.25 || 60% || 20% || 5 || 10% || 7 || 0.8 || 16 || 3 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
